# Phase-09 — DataOps, Platform Engineering & DevOps

> Operationalize data platforms with automation, IaC, and platform engineering.
>
> Suggested timeline: **Weeks 33-37**

Each prompt below instructs GitHub Copilot to generate exactly one standalone Markdown
chapter with all 50 mandatory sections (Azure-primary, ~60/30/10 Azure/OSS/AWS+GCP).

| # | Prompt | Generates | Study time |
|---|--------|-----------|------------|
| 01 | [DataOps Foundations](01_DataOps_Foundations.prompt.md) | `DataOps_Foundations.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 02 | [Platform Engineering](02_Platform_Engineering.prompt.md) | `Platform_Engineering.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 03 | [DevOps and CI/CD](03_DevOps_and_CI_CD.prompt.md) | `DevOps_and_CICD.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 04 | [Infrastructure as Code with Terraform](04_Infrastructure_as_Code_with_Terraform.prompt.md) | `Infrastructure_as_Code.md` | 75 min + 5h |
| 05 | [Containers with Docker](05_Containers_with_Docker.prompt.md) | `Containers_Docker.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 06 | [Kubernetes](06_Kubernetes.prompt.md) | `Kubernetes.md` | 90 min + 6h |
| 07 | [Orchestration with Airflow](07_Orchestration_with_Airflow.prompt.md) | `Orchestration_Airflow.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 08 | [GitOps and Environment Management](08_GitOps_and_Environment_Management.prompt.md) | `GitOps_and_Environments.md` | 45 min + 3h |

## How to run
Open a prompt file in VS Code and run it with GitHub Copilot (agent mode), or reference it
from Copilot Chat. It will produce the corresponding `.md` chapter listed above.
